scope: EP8 owner-rank MoE training VJP backend selection for DeepSeek-V4 Flash on MI350

ep8_owner_rank_probe_surface.read: EP8 changes the GEMM shape distribution by aggregating routed tokens from all ranks into fewer owner-local experts, avoiding much of the one-GPU 96-row/expert tiny-GEMM pathology.

ep4_owner_rank_comparison.read: At the EP4 owner-rank shape, Primus-Turbo Triton grouped-GEMM is correct but does not improve latency; the retained Triton-SwiGLU padded branch is fastest.

ep8_owner_rank_comparison.read: At the EP8 owner-rank shape, Primus-Turbo Triton improves the grouped wgrad slice, but the full local VJP still ties padded torch and loses to the retained Triton-SwiGLU branch because xgrad/recompute/SwiGLU overhead offsets the wgrad gain.

retained_padded_torch_owner_rank_vjp.note: This artifact also contains the Triton-SwiGLU candidate below; values here are the padded torch baseline in that same run.

retained_padded_triton_swiglu_owner_rank.read: Best current owner-rank local VJP probe. This is math/local-owner timing, not full routed TorchTitan backward wall time.

primus_turbo_triton_grouped_gemm.read: Correct and close to padded torch, but slower than the retained Triton-SwiGLU padded branch.

primus_turbo_hipblaslt_grouped_gemm.read: Correct but slower than padded torch at the EP8 owner-rank target shape.

observed_failures: bf16 rows40 normal grouped GEMM NN/NT, variable-K wgrad, old trans_c path, and autograd all segfault with returncode -11
bf16 rows256 normal grouped GEMM NT and variable-K wgrad segfault with returncode -11
fp16 rows256 normal grouped GEMM NT and variable-K wgrad segfault with returncode -11

source_inspection.read: The wrapper obtains a CK runner from get_ck_grouped_gemm_instance(...) and calls runner->run(...). The runtime is MI350/gfx950, so this is on the intended GFX950 branch, but every actual BF16/FP16 grouped-GEMM invocation segfaults in the installed image before producing a tensor.

decision.ck_next_action_if_required: Patch/rebuild Primus-Turbo CK grouped-GEMM for MI350/gfx950 and add a null/error guard around missing CK runner instances before attempting DSv4 VJP integration.
decision.moe_next_action: Treat EP8 as reducing the one-GPU tiny/ragged GEMM pathology; continue with fused/production owner-rank MoE backward work around the 6.42 ms EP8 local VJP baseline and full TorchTitan routed-backward integration costs.
